description.ko: 소리의 보이지 않는 구조를 시각화하여 청각 데이터를 빛과 움직임의 몰입형 풍경으로 변환하는 정교한 디지털 경험입니다.
description.en: A sophisticated digital experience that visualizes the invisible architecture of sound, transforming auditory data into an immersive landscape of light and movement.

prompt: High-tech sound visualization of ECHO-0, abstract 3D audio waves flowing through a dark void, glowing neon blue and magenta frequency lines, cinematic lighting, hyper-detailed particles, mathematical symmetry, 8k resolution, futuristic aesthetic.
